props.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap'); .beat { position:absolute; inset:0; background:#0E0F12; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; } .manifesto-wrap { max-width: 1500px; padding: 0 80px; text-align:center; } .manifesto { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 88pt; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -1px; color: #FAF8F5; margin:0; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); animation: fadeUp 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1) 0.05s forwards; } @keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250, 248, 245, 0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; opacity: 0; animation: creditsIn 0.4s ease-out 1.6s forwards; } @keyframes creditsIn { to { opacity: 1; } }

props.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap'); .beat { position:absolute; inset:0; background:#0E0F12; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; } .manifesto-wrap { max-width: 1500px; padding: 0 80px; text-align:center; position:relative; } .manifesto { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 88pt; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -1px; color: #FAF8F5; margin:0; position:relative; display:inline; } .period { display:inline; position:relative; } .spark { position:absolute; display:inline-block; width:14px; height:14px; right:-22px; bottom: 18px; border-radius:50%; background:#6B4FE0; box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0.0); opacity:0; animation: sparkIn 0.2s ease-out 1.5s forwards, sparkBlast 2s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.6,0.2,1) 2.0s forwards; } @keyframes sparkIn { to { opacity:1; } } @keyframes sparkBlast { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0.8); transform: scale(1); } 60% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 600px rgba(107,79,224,0.18); transform: scale(1.4); opacity: 1; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1200px rgba(107,79,224,0.0); transform: scale(1.6); opacity:0; } } .bloom { position:absolute; left:50%; top:50%; width:0; height:0; border-radius:50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(234,227,255,0.35) 0%, rgba(107,79,224,0.18) 40%, rgba(14,15,18,0) 70%); animation: bloomGrow 2.5s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.6,0.2,1) 2.0s forwards; } @keyframes bloomGrow { 0% { width:0; height:0; opacity:0; } 30% { opacity:0.9; } 100% { width: 2800px; height: 2800px; opacity: 0; } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250, 248, 245, 0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

props.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap'); .beat { position:absolute; inset:0; background:#0E0F12; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; padding: 60px; box-sizing:border-box; } .panel { width: min(1320px, 88%); background: #16171b; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px 32px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(107,79,224,0.06), 0 40px 80px -20px rgba(75,51,184,0.4); position:relative; min-height: 720px; opacity: 0; animation: panelIn 0.5s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes panelIn { to { opacity: 1; } } .panel-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #6B4FE0; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(107,79,224,0.6); } .panel-title { font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; color: #FAF8F5; flex:1; } .gear { font-size: 18px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.5); } .meta-line { font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.4); letter-spacing: 0.01em; margin-bottom: 22px; } .tabs { display:flex; gap: 28px; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.45); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); padding-bottom: 10px; margin-bottom: 40px; } .tab.active { color: #FAF8F5; border-bottom: 2px solid #6B4FE0; padding-bottom: 12px; margin-bottom: -11px; } .ask-area { position:relative; padding: 40px 0; min-height: 360px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-start; gap: 80px; } .prompt-floating { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.4; color: #FAF8F5; text-align:center; max-width: 900px; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); animation: promptIn 0.6s ease-out 0.3s forwards; } @keyframes promptIn { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .input { width: 100%; max-width: 900px; height: 64px; border: 1px solid rgba(107,79,224,0.25); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display:flex; align-items:center; padding: 0 22px; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.4); position:relative; } .input-placeholder { opacity: 0.8; } .caret { display:inline-block; width: 2px; height: 22px; background: #6B4FE0; margin-left: 4px; animation: caret 0.8s steps(1) infinite; vertical-align: middle; } @keyframes caret { 0%, 50% { opacity: 1; } 51%, 100% { opacity: 0; } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

transform: translate(-50%, 0); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, 80px); } } .input { width: 100%; max-width: 900px; height: 64px; border: 1px solid rgba(107,79,224,0.25); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); display:flex; align-items:center; padding: 0 22px; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; color: #FAF8F5; position:relative; margin-top: 100px; animation: inputFill 0.2s ease-out 0.5s both; } @keyframes inputFill { 0% { border-color: rgba(107,79,224,0.25); } 50% { border-color: #6B4FE0; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(107,79,224,0.4); } 100% { border-color: rgba(107,79,224,0.25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0); } } .input-prompt { opacity: 0; animation: showInput 0.1s ease-in 0.3s forwards, hideInput 0.1s ease-out 1.4s forwards; } @keyframes showInput { to { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes hideInput { to { opacity: 0; } } .glow { position:absolute; inset: -2px; border-radius: 14px; pointer-events:none; opacity: 0; animation: pulseGlow 0.5s ease-out 1.0s; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0.5); } @keyframes pulseGlow { 0% { opacity:1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0.5); } 100% { opacity:0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 16px rgba(107,79,224,0); } } .user-bubble { align-self: flex-end; max-width: 70%; background: rgba(107,79,224,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(107,79,224,0.28); border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; color: #FAF8F5; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-180px) scale(0.9); animation: bubbleIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1) 1.4s forwards; } @keyframes bubbleIn { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } } .thinking-dot { font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 10px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out 2.2s forwards; } @keyframes fadeIn { to { opacity: 1; } } .pulse { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius:50%; background: #6B4FE0; animation: pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.9); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.2); } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

↳ pace mentor 整理后

你最近 8 轮 cc 都在改 IPC 启动顺序。

关键改动：panel preload 加了 50ms setTimeout 兜底，是临时方案。

这周还有 2 个 commit 没人 review 过。

你这周在做 收尾活，还有 2 个 commit 没 review。

建议下一步：

  • - 找 Tom（这事得他点头）确认收尾这波 IPC 重构稳不稳
  • - 把「临时 setTimeout 50ms 兜底」在 PR 描述里写清楚是临时方案
  • - 让晓婷知道这周收尾会比预期晚半天
  • - 下周一站会前 问问阿珍 有没有视觉细节要带上
5 个工具 · 29 秒 · 才开口

} 100% { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); } } .full-tom { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; padding: 60px; box-sizing:border-box; opacity: 0; animation: fullIn 0.2s ease-out 1.35s forwards; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-12px); animation: bannerSlide 0.35s ease-out 1.55s forwards; } @keyframes bannerSlide { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .banner-full em { color:#fff; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; } .tabs { display:flex; gap: 28px; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.45); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); gap: 20px; } .q-bubble { align-self: flex-end; max-width: 70%; background: rgba(107,79,224,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(107,79,224,0.28); border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; color: #FAF8F5; opacity: 0; clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); animation: typeQ 1.2s steps(15) 2.0s forwards, qBubble 0.3s ease-out 2.0s forwards; } @keyframes typeQ { to { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); } } @keyframes qBubble { to { opacity: 1; } } .pulse-row { font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.5); display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 10px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out 3.4s forwards; } @keyframes fadeIn { to { opacity: 1; } } .p-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius:50%; background: #6B4FE0; animation: pulseDot 1.2s ease-in-out infinite 3.4s; } @keyframes pulseDot { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.9); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.2); } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.55); NowTeamAsk
这一波 IPC 重构稳吗？
Tom · 第一人称答

这事得我点头——但 ship 我 OK，PR 里写明这是临时方案就行。

setTimeout 50ms 兜底有点脆，下周我建议加一层 retry。

另外这个改动我看过 diff 了，整体没问题，你直接合。

— Tom（Eng）

Tom · 这事得他点头

props.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap'); .beat { position:absolute; inset:0; background:#0E0F12; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; padding: 80px; box-sizing:border-box; } .deny-wrap { max-width: 1500px; text-align:center; position:relative; } .deny { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 88pt; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -1px; color: #FAF8F5; margin: 0; position: relative; display: inline-block; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); animation: denyIn 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1) 0.2s forwards, denyRed 0.8s ease-in-out 4.2s forwards; } @keyframes denyIn { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @keyframes denyRed { to { color: #C44A4A; } } .deny-text { position:relative; display:inline-block; } .period { display:inline; } .redline { position:absolute; left: -20px; right: -20px; bottom: 22%; height: 6px; background: #C44A4A; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left center; animation: lineDraw 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) 4.0s forwards; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(196,74,74,0.6); } @keyframes lineDraw { to { transform: scaleX(1); } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

它不是 task tracker。
✦ pace

它是 mentor。

它读你的 cc。

它在你电脑里。

它告诉你下一步找谁、话怎么开。

background:#0E0F12; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; padding: 80px; box-sizing:border-box; flex-direction:column; gap: 0; } .shrink-deny { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 88pt; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -1px; color: #C44A4A; position:absolute; left:50%; top:50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); animation: shrink 0.4s ease-in 0.1s forwards; } @keyframes shrink { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.05); opacity: 1; } } .flip-dot { position:absolute; left:50%; top:50%; width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:50%; background: #C44A4A; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0); animation: dotShow 0.05s steps(1) 0.5s forwards, colorFlip 0.6s ease-in-out 0.6s forwards, dotBlast 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.6,0.2,1) 1.4s forwards; } @keyframes dotShow { to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); } } @keyframes colorFlip { 0% { background: #C44A4A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(196,74,74,0); } 100% { background: #6B4FE0; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(107,79,224,0.5); } } @keyframes dotBlast { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(107,79,224,0.6); } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(2); box-shadow: 0 0 0 240px rgba(107,79,224,0); opacity: 0; } } .wordmark-wrap { position:relative; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap: 28px; opacity: 0; animation: wmIn 0.8s ease-out 2.0s forwards; } @keyframes wmIn { to { opacity: 1; } } .wordmark { font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 88pt; line-height: 1; color: #FAF8F5; letter-spacing: -1px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 18px; } .mark-star { color: #6B4FE0; font-size: 0.8em; } .affirm { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap: 8px; font-family:'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.55; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.85); text-align:center; margin-top: 12px; } .af { margin: 0; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); } .af1 { animation: afIn 0.5s ease-out 2.4s forwards; } .af2 { animation: afIn 0.5s ease-out 2.75s forwards; } .af3 { animation: afIn 0.5s ease-out 3.1s forwards; } .af4 { animation: afIn 0.5s ease-out 3.45s forwards; } @keyframes afIn { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } strong { color: #d6c8ff; font-weight: 600; } .cta { font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 18px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.7); margin-top: 24px; opacity: 0; animation: ctaIn 0.6s ease-out 5.0s forwards, ctaFade 2s ease-in-out 7.5s forwards; } @keyframes ctaIn { to { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes ctaFade { to { opacity: 0.4; } } .credits { position:absolute; bottom: 24px; right: 32px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(250,248,245,0.55); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
